entries.result: A handful of rusty copper coins and a chipped dagger. Barely worth the pocket lint.
A small leather pouch containing a few silver coins and a tarnished silver locket.
A semi-precious gemstone (garnet or turquoise) wrapped in stained cloth.
A scroll case containing a spell scroll (single-use, random minor spell).
A finely crafted elven shortsword with faintly glowing runes along the blade.
A potion of healing in a crystal vial, shimmering with a soft golden light.
A legendary amulet of the lost dwarf-king, pulsing with ancient power.
